violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board noted not properly maintained in the grill area.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tiles in the Exhibit Hall kitchen and ceiling in the main kitchen (Paint Peeling) noted need repair. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around cooking equipment and other in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin and walkin coolers and freezers noted not in good repair. Metal shelves are rusted not in good repair
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors and exteriors portable fans and fan guards heat lamps and other cooking equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the Exhibit Hall dish machine.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting boards and microwave interiors noted not properly maintained.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen..
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer interiors and exteriors portable fans and fan guards heat lamps and other cooking equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin and walkin coolers and freezers noted not in good repair. Metal shelves are rusted not in good repair
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour sugar etc. All utensils must have handles and be kept out of product..
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tiles in the Exhibit Hall kitchen noted need repair.
